query:
INSERT INTO community_posts (authorId, authorName, category, supplierSubCategory, supplierPostType, title, bodyHtml, isPinned, isHidden, isDraft, requiresConfirmation, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, 'Attraction World Update', '

Attraction World Update — SeaWorld Parks Single Visit Tickets valid for 2026. Limited time offer expiring 30th June 2026. Orlando Magic NBA Playoffs home games now live.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', 'cruise', NULL, 'P&O Cruises — New Regional Flights for Atlantic Island Fly Cruises', '

P&O Cruises — Additional seats from Bournemouth, Edinburgh and Liverpool on select 26/27 Atlantic Island Fly cruises. Available from 9am Monday 27th April.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, 'Somak Luxury Travel — Honouring Earth Day with South Africa', '

Somak Luxury Travel — South African Safari & Mauritius packages from £4,450pp. Departs June & September 2026, British Airways flights included.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, '🆕 NEW SUPPLIER: Shanti Travel — Tailor-Made Asia Holidays', '

Shanti Travel specialises in tailor-made holidays across Asia (Sri Lanka, India, Indonesia, Vietnam, Japan). NETT rates, fully bespoke itineraries.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, '🆕 NEW SUPPLIER: Vivi Magic Travels — France Tailor-Made Holidays', '

Vivi Magic Travels (part of Magic Travels) specialises in bespoke France holidays. NETT rates, strong local knowledge, flexible for all travel styles.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, '🆕 NEW SUPPLIER: Magic Arabia UAE — UAE & Middle East Holidays', '

Magic Arabia UAE delivers bespoke travel across the UAE — Dubai, Abu Dhabi, desert adventures. NETT rates, fully tailor-made itineraries.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, 'XS2 Events — 14 New Sporting Events', '

XS2 Events has added 14 new sporting events across Europe and the Americas — Super Bowl, Cheltenham Festival, NBA, premier golf tournaments.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, 'Gold Medal Weekly Update', '

Gold Medal weekly update. Register for Farebank rewards when making a booking!

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'events', NULL, NULL, 'Magic Arabia Egypt & Marassi — Agent Webinar 6th May', '

Magic Arabia Egypt and Marassi invite you to discover the beauty of Egypt North Coast. Webinar: Wednesday 6th May, 10:30am GMT.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, 'Domes Resorts — Adults Edition April Highlights', '

Domes Resorts — adults-only collection in Greece: Domes Noruz Kassandra, Aulūs Elounda, Aulūs Chania. Ultra All-Inclusive options available.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', 'cruise', NULL, 'Virgin Voyages — Semi-Annual Sale & Project Ruby AI', '

Virgin Voyages Semi-Annual Sale: rates from £79 per Sailor per night. Up to $400 USD onboard credit on Med/Alaska voyages. Introducing Project Ruby AI platform.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, 'ATI Holidays — Namibian Fuel Surcharge Update', '

ATI Holidays update on Namibian fuel surcharge. Namibia maintains 750 million litre reserve. Supply predominantly from Nigeria (80%).

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'events', NULL, NULL, 'Sani/Ikos Agents that Brunch — London & St Albans September 2026', '

Sani/Ikos Agents that Brunch events: St Albans 23rd Sept, London 24th Sept. Limited spaces — RSVP to tradesales@saniikosgroup.com.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-23 12:00:00', '2026-04-23 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'events', NULL, NULL, 'easyJet Holidays TOOT Cardiff — 3rd June 2026', '

easyJet Holidays Team Orange On Tour Cardiff. Date: 3rd June 2026, Steinbeck & Shaw, Greyfriars Road, Cardiff, 6:30pm.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-24 12:00:00', '2026-04-24 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, 'Jet2holidays — New Product Launches April 2026', '

Jet2holidays new product launches for April 2026. New hotels and destinations added across Mediterranean and long-haul portfolio.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-24 12:00:00', '2026-04-24 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, 'Thomas Cook — Summer 2026 Early Bird Deals', '

Thomas Cook Summer 2026 early bird deals now available. Exclusive agent rates on select departures.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-24 12:00:00', '2026-04-24 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', 'cruise', NULL, 'MSC Cruises — World Cruise 2027 Now Open', '

MSC Cruises World Cruise 2027 now open for bookings. 117 nights visiting 57 destinations across 6 continents.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-24 12:00:00', '2026-04-24 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, 'Riviera Travel — River Cruise Agent Incentive', '

Riviera Travel river cruise agent incentive. Book 3 river cruises and earn a complimentary cabin upgrade for your clients.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-25 12:00:00', '2026-04-25 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, 'Kuoni — Luxury Maldives Packages Summer 2026', '

Kuoni luxury Maldives packages for Summer 2026. Overwater bungalows from £3,499pp including flights.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-25 12:00:00', '2026-04-25 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'news_announcements', NULL, NULL, 'JLT Group — April Business Update', '

JLT Group April business update. Key performance metrics, upcoming events and team news.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-25 12:00:00', '2026-04-25 12:00:00'), (NULL, 'Steph Humphrey', 'supplier_news_deals', NULL, NULL, 'Attraction World — Bank Holiday Deals', '

Attraction World bank holiday deals. Extended validity on theme park tickets across Orlando and European destinations.

', 0, 0, 0, 0, '2026-04-26 12:00:00', '2026-04-26 12:00:00');
